욥기 38:1.content: Then Yahweh answered Job out of the whirlwind,

욥기 38:2.content: “Who is this who darkens counsel by words without knowledge?

욥기 38:3.content: Brace yourself like a man, for I will question you, then you answer me!

욥기 38:4.content: “Where were you when I laid the foundations of the earth? Declare, if you have understanding.

욥기 38:5.content: Who determined its measures, if you know? Or who stretched the line on it?

욥기 38:6.content: What were its foundations fastened on? Or who laid its cornerstone,

욥기 38:7.content: when the morning stars sang together, and all the sons of God shouted for joy?

욥기 38:8.content: “Or who shut up the sea with doors, when it broke out of the womb,

욥기 38:9.content: when I made clouds its garment, and wrapped it in thick darkness,

욥기 38:10.content: marked out for it my bound, set bars and doors,

욥기 38:11.content: and said, ‘You may come here, but no further. Your proud waves shall be stopped here?’

욥기 38:12.content: “Have you commanded the morning in your days, and caused the dawn to know its place,

욥기 38:13.content: that it might take hold of the ends of the earth, and shake the wicked out of it?

욥기 38:14.content: It is changed as clay under the seal, and presented as a garment.

욥기 38:15.content: From the wicked, their light is withheld. The high arm is broken.

욥기 38:16.content: “Have you entered into the springs of the sea? Or have you walked in the recesses of the deep?

욥기 38:17.content: Have the gates of death been revealed to you? Or have you seen the gates of the shadow of death?

욥기 38:18.content: Have you comprehended the earth in its width? Declare, if you know it all.

욥기 38:19.content: “What is the way to the dwelling of light? As for darkness, where is its place,

욥기 38:20.content: that you should take it to its bound, that you should discern the paths to its house?

욥기 38:21.content: Surely you know, for you were born then, and the number of your days is great!

욥기 38:22.content: Have you entered the treasuries of the snow, or have you seen the treasures of the hail,

욥기 38:23.content: which I have reserved against the time of trouble, against the day of battle and war?

욥기 38:24.content: By what way is the lightning distributed, or the east wind scattered on the earth?

욥기 38:25.content: Who has cut a channel for the flood water, or the path for the thunder storm,

욥기 38:26.content: to cause it to rain on a land where there is no man, on the wilderness, in which there is no man,

욥기 38:27.content: to satisfy the waste and desolate ground, to cause the tender grass to grow?

욥기 38:28.content: Does the rain have a father? Or who fathers the drops of dew?

욥기 38:29.content: Whose womb did the ice come out of? Who has given birth to the gray frost of the sky?

욥기 38:30.content: The waters become hard like stone, when the surface of the deep is frozen.

욥기 38:31.content: “Can you bind the cluster of the Pleiades, or loosen the cords of Orion?

욥기 38:32.content: Can you lead the constellations out in their season? Or can you guide the Bear with her cubs?

욥기 38:33.content: Do you know the laws of the heavens? Can you establish its dominion over the earth?

욥기 38:34.content: “Can you lift up your voice to the clouds, That abundance of waters may cover you?

욥기 38:35.content: Can you send out lightnings, that they may go? Do they report to you, ‘Here we are?’

욥기 38:36.content: Who has put wisdom in the inward parts? Or who has given understanding to the mind?

욥기 38:37.content: Who can count the clouds by wisdom? Or who can pour out the containers of the sky,

욥기 38:38.content: when the dust runs into a mass, and the clods of earth stick together?

욥기 38:39.content: “Can you hunt the prey for the lioness, or satisfy the appetite of the young lions,

욥기 38:40.content: when they crouch in their dens, and lie in wait in the thicket?

욥기 38:41.content: Who provides for the raven his prey, when his young ones cry to God, and wander for lack of food?
